textByHashes.d36a010e5ff80a249df044c60888d4142120d154: Oi! Where do you think you're going pal?
textByHashes.447774b9c99cdc82fa647bf6b81346a65d706374: You're one of a very lucky few then.
textByHashes.a34d5d21d735b55c2c9d1289b9afd6aed8d6bbaf: Hartigen the Black Knight? I don't think so. He doesn't dress like that.
textByHashes.4e3f7d327366adb1a2d7ef5064424e4a2273973a: I assume you have your I.D. papers then?
textByHashes.6ea7ddb63c69d677c2305ac45e70ba9be650bd16: You'd better come in then. Grip will want to talk to you.
